case_title: CARRASCO, JOSE et al VS A-ABCO RENTALS et al

docket_entries.description: CERT. RECEIPT SENT TO WILLIE-HOOKS (A-ABCO RENTALS) RETURNED SIGNED.
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF CARRASCO, ORLANDO HEARING SET FOR JAN-21-1997 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRASCO, JOSE CARRASCO, ORLANDO IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT A-ABCO RENTALS HOOKS, WILLIE (DRIVER) C/O A-ABCO RENTALS DEFECTIVE PROOF OF SERVICE. DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFT HOOKS, WILLIE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-21-1997, DENIED
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT A-ABCO RENTALS HOOKS, WILLIE (DRIVER) C/O A-ABCO RENTALS
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY PLTFF. JOSE CARRASCO, NOT DEFEND. (SEE FILE, THIS IS THE ONLY WAY TO CREATE APPEAL FOR PLTFF. ON DENIAL OF MOVAC)
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 24959, RECORD TRANSFERRED

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CARRASCO, JOSE CARRASCO, ORLANDO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT A-ABCO RENTALS $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,015.00, JUDGM. ENTERED IN SCA 24959 ON 3-26-97. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CARRASCO, JOSE CARRASCO, ORLANDO AS TO DEFENDANT A-ABCO RENTALS HOOKS, WILLIE (DRIVER) C/O A-ABCO RENTALS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-02-1996 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT C
CERT. RECEIPT SENT TO A-ABCO RETURNED SIGNED.
